docs:
# Text Scramble
Decrypt-style character scramble animation on load.
## Import
```tsx
import { TextScramble } from "@/components/ui/text-scramble";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<TextScramble text="ACCESS GRANTED" duration="1200s" count={undefined} color={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **text** (string) — default: `"ACCESS GRANTED"`: Text
- **duration** (number) — default: `1200`: Duration (ms)
- **count** (number): Ray count
- **color** (string): Color
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add text-scramble
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/text-scramble
```
